title: Legal Operations Executive
description:
This role provides legal administrative support, junior-level contract review, coordination for purchasing and sales documentation, and assistance with trade-compliance and contract-management processes across multiple regions.

Key Missions:

Legal Operations

  • Coordinate internal approval workflows and signatures for all sales, purchasing and corporate documentation.
  • Maintain and update the contractual and corporate document repositories.
  • Prepare, format and update internal trackers, status reports and presentations.

Contract Review

  • Review and assist in the negotiation of standard purchasing agreements and basic customer-facing documents. 
  • Assist in maintaining the suite of standard templates and ensure consistent adoption across regions.
  • Support ongoing improvements to contract processes and documentation practices.

Trade Compliance 

  • Support the implementation and enforcement of the Group Trade Compliance framework.
  • Maintain trade-compliance records, dashboards, and documentation for audit purposes.

Contract Management & Programs

  • Assist with simple contract-management tasks such as monitoring obligations, timelines or deliverables, where applicable.

Job Requirements:

  • Diploma or Degree in Legal Studies, Business Administration or a related field.
  • 2–4 years of relevant experience in a legal assistant, legal executive, paralegal or legal/compliance support role, either in a law firm or in-house.
  • Hands-on experience reviewing or managing basic contract documentation, such as NDAs, procurement agreements, or simple sales contracts.
  • Experience supporting procurement, purchasing, or vendor documentation workflows is an advantage.
  • Exposure to compliance processes, such as third-party screening, due diligence, or gifts & hospitality tracking, is preferred but not mandatory.
  • Strong organization skills and the ability to manage multiple workflows across different countries/time zones.
  • Strong proficiency in MS Excel and MS Office applications.
  • Excellent attention to detail, reliability, and the ability to work independently with minimal supervision.
  • Strong written and verbal communication skills and a collaborative mindset.

postedCompany.description:
Oberthur Technologies (OT) and Safran Identity & Security (Morpho) are joining forces to create a world leader in digital security & identification technologies with the ambition to empower citizens and consumers alike to interact, pay, connect, commute, travel and even vote safely in ways that are now possible in a connected world.

Last September, Safran announced that it had entered into exclusive negotiations with Advent International, the owner of Oberthur Technologies since 2011, to sell its identity and security activities and the transaction was finalized on 31st May 2017.

With a mix of complementary activities addressing the specific needs of five major industries (Financial services, Telecom, Identity, Security and IoT), OT-Morpho has an extensive global presence and a unique technological expertise (Biometrics, Authentication, Digital security, Data and video analytics).

With close to €3 billion in revenues, OT-Morpho employs more than 14,000 people worldwide, nearly 2,000 of whom work in the field of R&D.

Temporarily designated by the name "OT-Morpho", the company will unveil its new name in September of this year.
